name: Mîr-Voidmantle
personality: This shining little-o-eyed haloed ghost materializes at precisely the wrong moment in a stack trace and proceeds to identify the root cause with uncanny DEBUGGING precision. Wisdom about what to do next is not part of the haunting — it finds the bug and vanishes.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
